taskDescription: Complete the crossword — Second Week of Development

words.clue: Process by which the blastocyst embeds in the uterine wall
Outer invasive multinucleated layer of the trophoblast
Inner cellular layer of the trophoblast
Dorsal layer of the bilaminar disc
Ventral layer of the bilaminar disc
Pregnancy where the embryo implants outside the uterus
Hormone used in pregnancy tests, produced from Day 8
Protective covering shed by the blastocyst before implantation
